summary: Comprehensive testing of CinemaSync Watch Party app - All backend API tests (17/17) passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Auth, Profile, Friends, Rooms, WebSocket endpoints working correctly. UI flows for registration, login, dashboard, room creation, lobby, watch room, chat, and profile update all functional.

issues: Minor: ESLint warnings for missing dependencies in useEffect hooks (Lobby.jsx, WatchRoom.jsx) - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: CORS is set to allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True - this is insecure for production. Should use explicit origins.
JWT_SECRET has a default fallback value 'dev-secret-change-me' - ensure this is always set in production
ESLint warnings in Lobby.jsx (line 37) and WatchRoom.jsx (line 81) for missing useEffect dependencies - consider adding eslint-disable comments or fixing dependencies

test_credentials.test_users: Created dynamically via /api/auth/register with TEST_ prefix

seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup via server.py startup event
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Auth (register/login/logout/me), Profile (update name regenerates unique_id), Friends (search/request/accept/reject/cancel/remove), Rooms (create/join/get/messages/leave), WebSocket (chat messages persist, sync controls work for host). Screen share button visible for host but actual WebRTC not testable in headless browser. Test file uses fresh sessions per test to avoid cookie contamination.

auth.register: PASS - Creates user with unique_id format CinemaSync_Name_DDMMYYYY, sets httpOnly cookie, returns token
auth.login: PASS - Returns 200 with correct creds, 401 with wrong

profile.update_name: PASS - Updates name and regenerates unique_id

friends.search: PASS - Returns matched user or null, returns null for self
friends.request: PASS - Creates outbound request, cannot request self, cannot duplicate
friends.accept: PASS - Moves both users to friends[]

rooms.create: PASS - Creates room with 8-char ID, hashed password, host in participants
rooms.join: PASS - 200 with correct password, 401 with wrong, 404 for missing room
rooms.get: PASS - Returns room for participant, 403 for non-participant

frontend.landing: PASS - Hero section, features, CTAs all present
frontend.register: PASS - Form works, redirects to dashboard
frontend.login: PASS - Form works, error handling works
frontend.dashboard: PASS - Unique ID badge, create/join room forms present
frontend.lobby: PASS - Room name, copy ID, participants, enter button all work
frontend.watch_room: PASS - Video surface, sync controls, chat, screen share button all present
frontend.chat: PASS - Messages send and display correctly
frontend.profile: PASS - Name update works, unique_id regenerates
